# 🎵 Sponsor VIO 83 AI ORCHESTRA

## Hi, I'm Viorica 👋🇮🇹

I'm a solo developer from Italy building **VIO 83 AI Orchestra** — the world's first intelligent multi-AI orchestration platform with verified answers.

---

### 🎯 The Problem I'm Solving

Today, using AI properly means:
- Paying for **5+ separate AI subscriptions** ($100+/month)
- Switching between **10+ browser tabs** constantly
- Getting **inconsistent, unverified answers** with no way to cross-check
- Having **zero privacy** — your data lives on someone else's cloud
- No ability to **compare models** or know which AI is best for which task

### 💡 The Solution: VIO 83 AI Orchestra

One desktop app. Every AI. Smart routing. Verified answers.

**7 AI providers in one interface:**
- **Claude Opus 4** (Anthropic) — Complex reasoning, research
- **GPT-4o** (OpenAI) — Creative writing, multimodal
- **Gemini 2.0 Flash** (Google) — Ultra-fast, 1M context window
- **Grok 3** (xAI) — Real-time information from X/Twitter
- **Mistral Large** — Multilingual reasoning
- **DeepSeek R1** — Math, science, deep reasoning
- **Ollama** — 100% offline local models (Llama, Qwen, Phi, Gemma)

**What makes VIO 83 unique (features NO other AI app has):**
- 🧠 **Smart Routing** — AI analyzes your question and picks the best model automatically
- 🛡️ **Cross-Check Verification** — A second AI independently verifies the first response, with concordance scoring (%)
- 📚 **RAG Knowledge Base** — Answers checked against certified academic sources (ChromaDB + SQLite FTS5)
- 🔄 **Visual Workflow Builder** — Drag-and-drop AI pipelines: Input → Router → Models → CrossCheck → Output
- 📊 **Analytics Dashboard** — Track performance, costs, quality per model over 7/30/90 days
- 🔒 **Privacy-First** — macOS Keychain for keys, zero telemetry, works 100% offline

**7 full UI pages built:** Dashboard, AI Chat, Workflow Builder, Cross-Check, Analytics, RAG Knowledge, AI Models Registry.

**Tech stack:** Tauri 2.0 (Rust) + React 18 (TypeScript) + FastAPI (Python) + Zustand + ChromaDB + Framer Motion + Vite 7

### 💚 Why I Need Your Support

I build this **entirely alone** on a **MacBook Air M1 with 8GB RAM**. No VC funding. No team. No salary. No backing from any company. Just me and my determination.

| Priority | What I Need | Cost | Why It Matters |
|----------|-------------|------|----------------|
| 🔴 **#1 CRITICAL** | API testing credits (7 providers) | ~€50/month | Every AI call costs real money. Testing Claude + GPT-4 + Gemini + Grok + Mistral + DeepSeek daily = €50+/month |
| 🟠 **#2 HARDWARE** | Mac Studio M4 Ultra (192GB RAM) | ~€5,000 | My M1 8GB literally cannot run models larger than 7B parameters. The Mac Studio would let me test 70B+ models locally, 10x faster development |
| 🟡 **#3 TIME** | Full-time development runway | ~€1,000/mo | More hours = more features, better quality, faster release |
| 🟢 **#4 INFRA** | Apple Developer Certificate + Domain | ~€150/year | Needed to sign and distribute the Tauri desktop app on macOS |

**Total goal: €5,200** — Mac Studio + 2 months of API credits + Apple cert.
